# Third-party notices

MarketMemento includes the following local dependencies so the app can work without CDN access after installation.

| Package | Version | License | License file |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Bootstrap | 5.3.3 | MIT | [bootstrap.txt](licenses/bootstrap.txt) |
| Bootstrap Icons | 1.11.3 | MIT | [bootstrap-icons.txt](licenses/bootstrap-icons.txt) |
| ApexCharts.js | 3.49.2 | MIT | [apexcharts.txt](licenses/apexcharts.txt) |
| Papa Parse | 5.4.1 | MIT | [papaparse.txt](licenses/papaparse.txt) |
| html2canvas | 1.4.1 | MIT | [html2canvas.txt](licenses/html2canvas.txt) |
| jsPDF | 2.5.2 | MIT | [jspdf.txt](licenses/jspdf.txt) |
| Manrope | Google Fonts repository revision v20 | SIL Open Font License 1.1 | [manrope-ofl.txt](licenses/manrope-ofl.txt) |
| Space Grotesk | Google Fonts repository revision v22 | SIL Open Font License 1.1 | [space-grotesk-ofl.txt](licenses/space-grotesk-ofl.txt) |

The packages remain the work of their respective authors. See each linked license file for the complete terms and copyright notices.
